creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: I've just tried to build fresh `graphics/mesa-dri` port on Mac mini G4 running 12.0-CURRENT (albeit pretty old one, around Mid-2016), and it builds and packages fine (it pulls GCC, but since 5.x and 6.x are broken on powerpc, I have GCC_VERSION set to 4.9 for powerpc).  No changes were required for the port itself.
